name: mrw-advisory-reviewer
description: M3 broker-side advisory reviewer — its own container/image. Reads a broker-rendered ground-truth diff (file or small inline payload) plus untrusted coder-authored title/body, runs ONE read-only, tool-less structured SDK session, and returns an advisory {verdict, notes}. Never gates the push: the broker's sha-typed human gate is authoritative regardless of what this returns or whether it answers at all.
